full_text:
Dong Hui (Xiuxu) 董恢 (休緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Hui (董恢), styledXiuxu (休緒), was born in Xiangyan. As an ambassador to Wu, advised Fei Yi on how to reply to Sun Quan. Dong Hui was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
